dependencies: Third-party hosting services and data center costs
Third-party service providers for cloud-based infrastructure
Third-party AI models and large language models
risks: Reliance on third-party service providers for hosting and content delivery services
Failure of third-party systems could cause service interruptions
Disruption or damage to third-party data centers
Inability to renew agreements with third-party service providers on favorable terms
Challenges accessing AI models, datasets or hardware
Lack of proper license or consent for training data used by third-party AI models

regulatory_risks: EU AI Act adopted in 2024 and implemented in phases through 2030
Evolving AI regulatory environment may increase compliance costs and liability
Inconsistencies among AI regulations across jurisdictions
General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) in European Economic Area and United Kingdom
Personal Information Protection Law in China
Developing privacy laws in India
California Consumer Privacy Act
California Privacy Rights Act
Colorado Privacy Act
Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act
SEC Rules on Cybersecurity Risk Management, Strategy, Governance, and Incident Disclosure
Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development's 15% global minimum tax regime effective for fiscal 2025
U.S. Tax Act requirement to capitalize and amortize research and development costs
Export control violations
Trade restrictions imposed by the United States and other countries
Economic sanctions and export controls
Antitrust and competition regulations
Changes in laws governing the free flow of data across international borders
Data residency requirements in certain countries
Cross-border data transfer restrictions
FTC investigation regarding disclosure and subscription cancellation practices under ROSCA
DOJ civil complaint filed June 17, 2024 alleging violations of ROSCA and FTC Act
Potential civil penalties, equitable monetary relief and injunctive relief from DOJ complaint

sanction_risks: Risks from geopolitical tensions including Russia-Ukraine war and conflict in the Middle East
Costs and delays from trade restrictions
